method.name: llm_reasoned
method.description: Compute statistical pairwise evidence, then ask an LLM to reason over stop-profile, representative route-image, and fleet-metadata evidence to produce final pairwise total_correlation values.

route_similarity.description: For each truck, choose the representative image from each route cluster, compare representative route-ink vectors by cosine similarity, and average pairwise similarities weighted by cluster shares.

method.global_rationale: Scores start from the statistical totals, then are adjusted using operational intensity, daily distance and speed, zone-pass volume, route-cluster distance summaries, and fleet metadata. Pairs with similar purpose/duty but very different route length or zone intensity were reduced; pairs with mismatched metadata but close short-distance operations were not penalized as strongly.
risks: Representative route-image similarities are uniformly low, so spatial-route evidence may be weak.
Stop-profile correlations can overstate similarity when total zone-pass volumes differ greatly.
All trucks have 31 observed days, but January-only behavior may not represent longer-term patterns.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Moderate similarity from same purpose/duty and overlapping stop zones, but 1350 operates much longer daily distances with far more zone activity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate positive stop-profile correlation with shared zone 4/7 behavior, but 1350 has much heavier zone 6/7 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route-image similarity is very low, so spatial route shape evidence is weak.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match, but 155 is much older and has higher kms than 1350.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Despite different purpose, this is operationally close: both have short daily distances and overlapping zone 4/7 behavior.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderately strong stop-profile correlation with shared zone 4/7 and zone 2 behavior, though 1363 has more total passes.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route similarity is very low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose, kms, and age similarity are weak.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty supports similarity, but 1421 has substantially longer routes and many more zone passes than 155.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate stop-profile correlation with overlap in zones 4 and 7, but 1421 also uses zone 8 and has much higher pass totals.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route similarity is very low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; age differs strongly and kms similarity is only moderate.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Stop-zone pattern overlaps, but 1247 runs much farther and has many more zone 4/7 passes with a different purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong stop-profile correlation due to shared zone 4/7 behavior, though 1247's zone activity is much heavier.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route similarity is very low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose differs, age differs, and kms similarity is moderate-low.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Some stop-zone and kms similarity exists, but 1575 has production-purpose, much longer daily distances, and different route intensity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Positive stop-profile correlation with zones 4/7 overlap and modest pass totals compared with other production trucks.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route similarity is very low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kms are similar, but purpose differs and age similarity is low.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation is offset by different purpose and much higher operating intensity for 1312.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong statistical stop-profile similarity, mainly from zone 4/7 overlap, but 1312 has far more zone 7 passes.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Representative route similarity is very low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches and kms are fairly similar, but purpose differs and age similarity is low.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile relationship and very different daily distance make this a weak behavioral match.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1311 mainly passes zone 6 while 155 uses zones 4, 7, and 2.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kms similarity help slightly, but purpose differs and age similarity is low.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile relationship and much higher production-style daily distance make similarity very low.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1423 emphasizes zone 6/7 while 155 emphasizes zones 4/7/2 with very few passes.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kms similarity provide limited support, but purpose differs and age similarity is low.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Different duty cycle, purpose, speed profile, and zone behavior outweigh the relatively higher route-image similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: No stop-profile correlation; 1506 is dominated by zone 2 while 155 has sparse zone 4/7/2 passes.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest route-image similarity among the pairs, but still not enough to indicate broad behavioral similarity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle differ, with only weak age/kms support.
